author: Vector (Codex AI strategy lane)
purpose: Match-spawn bot strategy knobs for SPLITROOT. The Unreal bot controller and brain read this contract at bot spawn so future strategy changes can be made from replay/live metadata without changing C++ constants.
hot_load_policy: Loaded when bots are configured. A running process needs the native loader once; after that, edits here apply to newly spawned bots and next-match loops without closing Jonathan's visible game.
iteration_notes: v7 keeps v6 role behavior, route_stall_max_unstick_attempts=5, objective_stall_max_lane_shift=3, and objective_lane_spacing=450, then lowers only objective_stall_lane_shift_attempts from 3 to 2. Post-adoption v6 metadata showed objective stalls still clustered before the first lane shift: ObjectiveStuckContextLaneZeroCount=60 versus ObjectiveStuckContextShiftedCount=26, with all core/movement/objective feature canaries covered. Do not attribute v7 to live behavior until LatestBotStrategyTuningLoadedRevision equals this revision.
